steps.t: Mokûrz Gundul lies to the north-west from Talan Fanuidhol. Bahanneth has asked you to enter Mokûrz Gundul and defeat the Orcs there. He has also asked…
Bahanneth is at Talan Fanuidhol, south-east of Mokûrz Gundul. You should return to Bahanneth with the stolen belongings you recovered and news of your…
